title: Shift
drDigitalIntro:
Shift changes what a key types.
• Hold Shift with a letter to make it uppercase.
• Hold Shift with a number to type the symbol above it — like 1 becoming !.

playgroundTask.instructions: Type the sentence exactly as shown — hold Shift to make capital letters and the exclamation point!

drDigitalSuccess: That's Shift — capital letters, symbols, and all!
drDigitalHint: Hold Shift while pressing a letter to capitalize it. For the exclamation point, hold Shift and press the 1 key. Type: Dr. Digital says: WOW!
